items.title: Modi's BJP conquers Bengal, one of India's toughest political frontiers
items.dek: West Bengal’s verdict could reshape not just the state’s politics, but the future trajectory of Modi’s BJP.

items.title: New alliances shakes up Nigerian political landscape
items.dek: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, who came third and fourth respectively in the last elections, switch parties.
